title: Yijing Hexagram 52: Gen (Keeping Still, Mountain)
description: Hexagram 52 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 52 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Keeping Still. Keeping his back still so that he no longer feels his body. He goes into his courtyard and does not see his people.
